meaning: v.(使)繁殖,教养,抚养n.品种,种类
examples: He used to breed dogs for the police.
Frogs will usually breed in any convenient pond.
Many animals breed only at certain times of the year.
We were looking for grayling, a breed of fish found only in cold subarctic waters.
Lazard has been the last of its breed of large, privately held banking partnerships.
